subcodes.first_line: O Haydar! Time and time again, repeatedly and in cycle after cycle, We have hearkened unto thy call. If the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حیدر ندایت مره بعد مره و کره بعد کره و طورا بعد طور اصغا شد اگر قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity
